title: PACX Track Metadata
description: Machine-readable metadata for conductor tracks. Enables validation, querying, and tooling.

track_id.description: Unique identifier for the track. Format: <short_name>_<YYYYMMDD>

type.description: Category of work this track represents.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the track.

phase.description: Roadmap phase number. 0 = cross-cutting infrastructure. 1-13 = roadmap phases.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the track was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last track update.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the track delivers.

dependencies.description: List of track_ids this track depends on. Empty array = no dependencies.

api_sources.description: External APIs, SDKs, or services this track integrates with.
